creator: denverh@comcast.net
text:
zim-0.75.2_3
14.1-RELEASE-p2

Start a new notebook, then create the following new pages:
Shower
Bathroom_Sink
A
Z

The order shown will be:
Shower
Z
A
Bathroom Sink

Pages that start with numbers always seem to be OK, and pages usually do get correctly put in alphabetical order, but there are some cases where that doesn't happen.
